actions: Copied renderer.js, input.js, app.js, index.html, styles.css from builder outputs into output/integration/.
Wrote output/integration/manifest.json describing entry point, file provenance, and load order.
Smoke check: opened index.html in jsdom, evaluated all scripts, verified renderer is reachable as window.renderer.render and inputUi as window.inputUi.onLatexChange.
Confirmed no overlap, no missing files, no script-order issues.
verification_summary: Integrated artifact assembled. Script order in index.html: katex.min.js -> renderer.js -> input.js -> app.js (all defer). Smoke check passed.
